_publications._publicationTitle: Development of an adeno-associated virus vector for gene replacement therapy of NF1-related tumors.

_contextSnippet: 557-2-GRDC24 significantly slowed the tumor growth, measured at 14 days after the treatment. However, the treatment effect was transient and disappeared in later imaging.
details: AAV-557-2-GRDC24 significantly slowed tumor growth at 14 days after treatment, but effect was transient
